user_prompt: Collect some relevant news articles about Agentic AI software services, and write a marketing post about FlowAI
content:
Imagine gaining back two precious hours every day. With FlowAI Core, that dream is a reality. Our intelligent automation learns your unique workflow, effortlessly managing repetitive tasks so you can focus on what truly matters.

In an era where quality data is essential for efficiency, FlowAI ensures that every action is smart and precise. As the future of work moves toward AI-driven solutions, we’re leading the charge by seamlessly integrating with over 50 tools you already use.

Whether you’re juggling deadlines, managing projects, or brainstorming new ideas, let FlowAI take the burden off your shoulders. Why settle for the ordinary when you can work less and flow more?

Start your journey to smarter productivity today for just $29/month. Reclaim your time, unleash your potential, and embrace the future of work with FlowAI Core. Your most productive self is just one click away!
sources: - [Why ‘Quality Data’, Not Big Data Is Critical For Process Efficiencies](https://www.forbes.com/sites/gauravsharma/2026/05/16/why-quality-data-not-big-data-is-critical-for-process-efficiencies/)

- [App days are numbered: The end state of software will be private, personal, verified, and AI agent-built](https://cryptoslate.com/app-days-are-numbered-the-end-state-of-software-is-private-personal-verified-and-ai-agent-built/)
- [Show HN: Strava for AI coding – analytics on your Copilot/Claude/Codex usage](https://github.com/microsoft/AI-Engineering-Coach)
- [Microsoft AI chief gives it 18 months—for all white-collar work to be automated by AI](https://fortune.com/article/why-microsoft-ai-chief-mustafa-suleyman-predicts-ai-automation-18-months/)

- [The Invisible Occupation: How Palantir and AI Built a Financial Prison the Masses Cheered For](https://www.activistpost.com/the-invisible-occupation-how-palantir-and-ai-built-a-financial-prison-the-masses-cheered-for/)

articles.title: Why ‘Quality Data’, Not Big Data Is Critical For Process Efficiencies
articles.description: Process industries say it's quality data, not randomly gathered data mountains, that matter in the age of industrial AI. Its why they are spending billions on it.

articles.title: App days are numbered: The end state of software will be private, personal, verified, and AI agent-built
articles.description: AI agents could end the app era by turning software into verified, user-built systems AI agents may make running code written by strangers one of those behaviors that later generations struggle to process. A society can normalize a risk for decades, then late…

articles.description: Mustafa Suleyman believes current AI computational power will only accelerate, disrupting every kind of work you do “sitting down at a computer.”

articles.title: The Invisible Occupation: How Palantir and AI Built a Financial Prison the Masses Cheered For
articles.description: As the state unleashes AI to police your bank account, starving the beast with decentralized privacy networks is the ultimate act of peaceful defiance. We are living in an occupied nation, but the occupying force didn’t arrive in tanks or uniform. They arrive…
